name: nft-chainless
description: The nft-storefront (Vitrine) must contain no wallet, chain, mint, token, gas, or blockchain surface anywhere in its code, UI, or API calls. This boundary is absolute — it is a brand commitment as well as a technical limit.

known_false_positives.reason: Vitrine's brand promise — negation of wallet is intentional copy proving the boundary
Hero line — explicitly anti-wallet; quoting the promise is not implementing a wallet
Nonclaim copy — disclaimer explicitly stating absence of chain
The boundary name — used in docs/tests/contracts to describe the boundary, not implement a chain

required_nonclaims.note: Every page footer must contain a synthetic disclaimer
First-purchase notice must explicitly say synthetic collectible
